```{r}
library(readr)
library(here)
# Load the data
df <- read.delim(here("data/v2/microarray_data_forDE/microarray_TB_classification.tsv"), sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

df$CONTRAST <- ifelse(!is.na(df$TB) & df$TB != "",
                      paste0(gsub("\\s+", "", df$TB), "_control"),
                      NA)

df$SIGNATURE_NAME <- apply(df[, c("series_id", "CONTRAST", "TIME_POINT", "TISSUE", "CELL")], 1, function(x) {
  names(x) <- c("series_id", "CONTRAST", "TIME_POINT", "TISSUE", "CELL")
  x["TISSUE"] <- tolower(x["TISSUE"])
  x["CELL"] <- tolower(x["CELL"])
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "", x)                     # remove all whitespace first
  parts <- x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]              # now remove empty strings
  if (length(parts) > 0) paste(parts, collapse = "_") else NA
})

df$SAMPLE_CONDITION <- apply(df[, c("series_id", "TB", "TIME_POINT", "TISSUE", "CELL")], 1, function(x) {
  names(x) <- c("series_id", "TB", "TIME_POINT", "TISSUE", "CELL")
  x["TISSUE"] <- tolower(x["TISSUE"])
  x["CELL"] <- tolower(x["CELL"])
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "", x)
  parts <- x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]
  if (length(parts) > 0) paste(parts, collapse = "_") else NA
})

# add paths to expression matrices
df$EXPRMAT_PATH <- paste0("data/microarray_data_forDE/expression_matrices/", df$series_id, ".tsv" )

write_tsv(df, file="~/Documents/GitHub/integrative-drugrep-tb/data/v2/microarray_data_forDE/clean_TB_sample_metadata_classification.tsv")
```
